evidence: type=1, effect_param[1]=1500 BPS; type=1_no_buff before mapping
type=1, effect_param[1]=3000 BPS = 30% max-HP heal (mirror shape of 1005015); appears on 休息回复 and similar non-attack heals
type=1, effect_param[0]=10000 BPS = 100% damage→HP drain
type=3, effect_param[0]=1 energy
type=1 cast=6 target=self; pak effect_param[0]=1 is the hit delta. editor_name '10' is the variant index, not the count
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +2 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +3 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +4 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +5 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +6 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +7 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +8 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +9 hits
type=1 cast=6 target=self; +10 hits
type=3, effect_param[0]=3 turns lock on actor's own skill slot; attached to defensive skills

type=1; pak emits two rows (target=self and target=enemy). op_dispel_marks reads ROW_TARGET only — all args are ignored. Acts as the dispel half of 焚烧烙印; per-side tally fed into ctx.marks_dispelled for the 1042014 row that follows.

type=1 cast=12 (TURN_END). op_dispel_marks_to_burn reads ROW_ARG0 as per-mark burn multiplier (ctx.burn_stacks += ctx.marks_dispelled * arg0). arg0=5 = 5 burn stacks per dispelled mark, sourced from pak effect_param[2] which lists 5 burn entries.
type=3, same as 1037001; pak uses different group IDs that the kernel does not distinguish
type=1 cast=12; +1 priority for the actor next turn
type=1 effect_param=[2,500,0,50,0]; mirrors 1005015 shape — param[1]=500 BPS = 5% max-HP heal. param[3]=50 energy-scaled secondary channel ignored by op_heal_hp (only ROW_ARG0 read).
type=1 effect_param=[2,2000,0,200,0]; param[1]=2000 BPS = 20% max-HP heal (mirror of 1005015 shape).
type=1 effect_param=[2,2500,0,250,0]; param[1]=2500 BPS = 25% max-HP heal.
type=1 effect_param=[2,6000,0,600,0]; param[1]=6000 BPS = 60% max-HP heal.
type=1 effect_param=[5000,0]; mirrors 1011001 shape — param[0]=5000 BPS = 50% damage→HP drain.
type=1 effect_param=[10000,0]; bug-element variant of 1011001 — same 100% drain shape.
type=3 effect_param=[2,0,0]; mirrors 1019001 — param[0]=2 energy gained.
type=3 effect_param=[3,0,0]; param[0]=3 energy gained. target_type varies (1 self / 5 team) — op_heal_energy only adds to ctx.heal_energy; row's ROW_TARGET drives dispatch.
type=3 effect_param=[4,0,0]; +4 energy.
type=3 effect_param=[5,0,0]; +5 energy.
type=3 effect_param=[10,0,0]; +10 energy.
type=1 effect_param=[1,2,99,99,0] — generic debuff cleanse on target (rows propagate target via ROW_TARGET). Equivalent to 净化debuff; op_dispel_debuffs reads ROW_TARGET only.
type=3 effect_param=[1]; swaps HP% with opponent. op_exchange_hp_ratio takes no args (sets ctx.exchange_hp_ratio=1).
type=3 effect_param=[3] target=enemy; swaps active mods/buffs with opponent (天理之眼). op_transfer_mods sets ctx.swap_mods=1 without args.
type=3 effect_param=[1]; swap move sets with enemy (盗术). op_exchange_moves sets ctx.swap_moves=1 without args.
type=1 effect_param=[0,1,0,0,99,1,1] target_type=4 (enemy buffs as source). Copies enemy's active positive buffs onto self. op_mirror_enemy_buffs sets ctx.mirror_enemy_buffs=1 without args.
type=3; effect_param[0]=7020451 is the 应对！突袭 response skill (dam_para=210). Same install-counter pattern as the rest of 1031xxx.
